title: Overlayed Snow
description: A resource pack that adds snow overlays onto blocks when covered with snow, using Fusion
body:
![Overlayed Snow Banner](https://i.postimg.cc/DfCrLPz8/os-banner.png)
**Overlayed Snow** is a resource pack for 1.20.1 (and under) that adds snow overlays onto blocks when covered with Snow layers, Snow Blocks, and Powdered Snow. A project from MarbledHubb Studios. [REQUIRES FUSION (CONNECTED TEXTURES)!](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures)

## Features
- Snow Layers on top of blocks add snowy overlays on top of them.
- Snow Blocks on top of blocks add snowy overlays on top of them.
- Powdered Snow on top of blocks add snowy overlays on top of them.

## Usage
- You may use this in your modpacks, no credit required but it would be apprecated.
- You may use this in your video, no credit required but it would be appreciated.
- You may NOT re-distribute this mod or its assets ANYWHERE. 

**MarbledHubb Studios** is proudly partnered with **[BisectHosting!](https://bisecthosting.com/marbledhubb?r=Modrinth)** When using our code "**marbledhubb**", you are saving **25%** off any gaming server while supporting us by commission, supporting the development of our projects!
